alerts.title: US charges Google engineer with using internal search data to pocket $1.2 million on Polymarket
alerts.summary: Prosecutors charged Spagnuolo with fraud and money laundering, while the CFTC filed a complaint alleging insider trading violations.

alerts.title: Google Engineer Charged Over $2.75 Million in Alleged Polymarket Insider Trading Bets
alerts.summary: The Google employee case is the second federal prosecution tied to alleged prediction market insider trading on Polymarket.

alerts.title: Kalshi Sues to Stop Minnesota From Enforcing America’s First Prediction Market Ban
alerts.summary: Prediction market giant Kalshi has asked a federal judge to prevent Minnesota from allowing the ban to go into effect in August.

alerts.title: Kalshi’s turn: Prediction markets platform sues Minnesota over law going into effect in August
alerts.summary: Following the CFTC's suit, Kalshi has sued the state of Minnesota after Governor Tim Walz signed a law blocking prediction markets.

alerts.title: Gemini taps SpaceXAI to build a personalized prediction markets feed
Bitcoin Traders Increasingly Convinced Price Will Fall Below $70K by End of May
alerts.summary: Prediction market odds are rising for Bitcoin to drop below $70,000 in the next few days following a dip to a six-week low price.

alerts.title: Prediction Market Myriad Launches $100K World Cup Competition
alerts.summary: A prize pool of over $100,000 is available for top traders and makers on prediction markets linked to FIFA World Cup matches.
